candidates_unresolved.name: DENTAL CARE CENTER JUSTICE LLC
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: Syed Rehman is listed as authorized official on DENTAL CARE CENTER JUSTICE LLC (NPI 1578160990). The practice operates at 8021 W 79th St Justice IL 60458 (active operation confirmed by justicedentalcenter.com and Yelp). The AO pattern is consistent with his confirmed President/owner role at MIRUS ORAL HEALTH — both are LLC dental practices with him as AO across different ZIPs. However, no documentary source explicitly states he is the owner of the Justice LLC (the website names no owner and no SOS filing was checked). Gate_status=candidate pending Illinois SOS filing confirmation of Rehman as organizer/member of DENTAL CARE CENTER JUSTICE LLC. If confirmed, upgrades to ready_for_validation as part of the Rehman dentist_multi cluster.

candidates_unresolved.name: DENTAL MAGIC NORTH AVE, INC
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: DENTAL MAGIC NORTH AVE, INC is one of two 'Dental Magic' branded entities under Sawsan Asfour's AO record, consistent with a dentist-founded private multi-location group. No MSO/PE evidence found. However this location is confirmed CLOSED on Yelp (2026), making it a stale shell. gate_status=candidate (not ready_for_validation): the AO link is structural signal and Yelp confirms the brand at this address, but direct documentary ownership evidence for this specific location was not found, and the closed status reduces confidence. The affiliated_dso='Dental 360' pre-label is a likely false positive and warrants a demotion review.

candidates_unresolved.name: ART OF MODERN DENTISTRY PEDIATRICS P.C
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: Pediatric-specialist-only satellite at 1510 S Wabash Ave, Chicago 60605. The NPPES entity name 'ART OF MODERN DENTISTRY PEDIATRICS P.C' and multiple web sources confirm this is a pediatric-only specialist office, not a general-practice location. Per census rules (GP-only), this location must be excluded from GP ownership tiers and the corporate floor denominator. candidate_tier=undetermined with gate_status=undetermined to signal specialist exclusion. The owner is almost certainly Dr. Daftary (same AO, same brand), but the GP classification does not apply here.

candidates_unresolved.name: DENTAL WISH LTD
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: DENTAL WISH LTD (NPI 1760794176) at 4101 W 26th St, Chicago IL 60623. Dr. Sunita Sahu is listed as authorized official on the NPPES NPI record (registered 2010) and appears in provider directories at this address. However, multiple other named dentists (Eric Andersen, Ashley Seide, Ronald Winn, Ian Hoffman) are listed at this practice, and no dedicated practice website or Secretary of State filing was found that clearly names Dr. Sahu as owner vs. associate at this specific entity. The AO designation on a multi-provider older Ltd entity may reflect a credentialing/admin role. Classified as candidate rather than ready_for_validation pending ownership confirmation. Structural picture remains dentist_multi: no DSO/MSO/PE evidence whatsoever.

candidates_unresolved.name: HOPE DENTAL P.C.
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: AO reach establishes Dr. Vesna Sutter DDS as the shared authorized official, and her confirmed multi-office dentist-owner role (President of North Ave. Dental Partners P.C.) makes dentist_multi the most plausible tier for the Hope Dental P.C. locations. However, no documentary source directly names Dr. Sutter as the current owner of this specific location's operating entity, and the address now appears to host a different practice under a different dentist. Gate stays candidate — needs physical address verification and confirmation that Hope Dental P.C. is still active and Sutter-operated at this address.

candidates_unresolved.name: HOPE DENTAL P.C.
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: AO reach and shared Hope Dental P.C. corporate name across Westchester and Aurora locations establish a two-location dentist-operated group. Dr. Sutter's confirmed role as President/dentist at a third location (North Ave. Dental Partners P.C.) corroborates her multi-office owner identity. No documentary source ties Hope Dental Aurora specifically to an MSO or DSO management layer — dentist_multi is the correct tier. Gate is candidate rather than ready_for_validation because no direct corroborating URL (group website, bio, shared filing) explicitly names Sutter as owner of this Aurora location specifically.

candidates_unresolved.name: SAQIB H. MOHAJIR, D.M.D.
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: The NPPES org name 'SAQIB H. MOHAJIR D.M.D.' with Saqib as his own authorized official, operating as a sub-part under parent 'MOHAMED K.H. MOHAJIR D.D.S.' at the same Alsip address, indicates this is a family co-practice billing entity — not an independently owned third office. The AO reach signal of 3 is inflated by 1 due to this family sub-part structure. Classification held as dentist_multi (it is part of the broader Mohajir family multi-dentist practice) but gate_status=candidate with low confidence because this specific location_id is a family co-location sub-part, not an independent Saqib-owned clinic. Downstream gate should assess whether this location should be merged with the Mohamed Mohajir family cluster or flagged as an AO-cluster false positive and excluded from the Saqib network count.

candidates_unresolved.name: METROPOLITAN DENTAL CARE
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: Dr. Yang originally opened Metropolitan Dental Care in Des Plaines (~2008) as confirmed by a Patch.com ribbon-cutting article. However, this location is now marked CLOSED on Yelp (June 2026), the NPPES org NPI has not been updated in ~18 years, and the current metropolitandentalcare.com shows completely different dentists with no connection to Yang. This is a stale/closed NPI shell — Yang's AO status is a historical artifact. Gate_status is 'candidate' rather than 'ready_for_validation' because while the Yang-ownership origin is corroborated, the current operational status is closed/transferred, making this a stale false positive for active GP denominator classification.

candidates_unresolved.name: CHICAGO STAR DENTAL PC
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: Chicago Star Dental PC at 3641 E 108th St, Chicago IL 60617 appears in NPPES with Yaqin Dawoud as AO, and the shared phone prefix with Stony Island Dental suggests the same operator. However, no consumer website, Yelp listing, or Healthgrades entry was found for this specific practice at this address — the address is associated with a medical center in web results. Given the absence of documentary corroboration for this location specifically, gate_status is 'candidate' and confidence is low. The owner identity (Yaqin Dawoud) is plausible based on the AO signal and phone proximity, but the location's operational status is unverified.

candidates_unresolved.name: ACDI - NAPERVILLE, LLC.
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: ACDI-NAPERVILLE LLC shares the ACDI brand and Zuzana Vitkova CFO signal with the confirmed ACDI multi-location network. However, the NPI record is from 2008/2009 and provider_count=0, suggesting this Naperville entity was never actively staffed or was closed early. The brand+AO chain corroborates the network identity (dentist_multi), but the specific location's operational status is too uncertain for ready_for_validation. gate_status=candidate pending validator confirmation that 1288 Rickert Dr is or was an operating ACDI dental office.

candidates_unresolved.name: ALL FAMILY DENTAL
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: NPPES lists WILLIAM LI, DDS as OWNER on this org NPI. However, no individual providers are currently associated with this address (provider_count=0 in practice_locations, org_only_npi in the practices table). The location counts in the 60616 GP denominator via the practice_locations solo_established classification, but it may be dormant or a legacy billing entity. DA officer corroboration exists only for the Oral Kare location, not this address directly. dentist_multi is the correct tier (same owner, same network), but gate_status=candidate because this specific location's active-practice status is uncertain and no documentary evidence directly corroborates the 60616 address as currently operating under Li's ownership.

candidates_unresolved.name: VIBHAKAR AND VIBHAKAR D.D.S.P.C.
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: Active family dental practice confirmed at 3902 Harlem Ave Lyons (Alldent Dental Center). Dr. Kamal Vibhakar and Dr. Charu Vibhakar (family pair) operate as a professional corporation at a single address for 40+ years. The AO cluster reach=2 arises because Kamal Vibhakar is also AO on the Amerident Associates NPI (60623), but that second location is closed — this is not a true multi-office expansion. dentist_multi is the best structural tier given two named dentists under one family PC, but gate_status=candidate because the AO cluster reach is a false positive (Location 2 is closed/stale). Standalone, this is a single-location family practice correctly classified as family_practice; it should NOT be promoted to corporate. No MSO/DSO structure found.

candidates_unresolved.name: AMERIDENT ASSOCIATES
candidates_unresolved.reasoning: This location is an AO-cluster false positive. The Amerident Associates NPI at 4008 W 26th St Chicago is marked CLOSED on Yelp (March 2026). The NPPES parent_company='1ST FAMILY DENTAL' conflicts with the verified 1st Family Dental Little Village address (4049 W 26th St — a different building one block away, per 1stfamilydental.com/locations/little-village/). Kamal Vibhakar's AO status here appears to be a stale artifact: he historically operated 'Amerident Dental Center' as his own brand (1991 newspaper records confirm Vibhakar at Harlem Ave Lyons with the Amerident name). The practice at 60623 appears closed; the 1st Family Dental affiliation in NPPES is an unverified parent_company field on a likely-closed record. Cannot assign dentist_multi (no evidence of active second Vibhakar office at this address) or branded_dso (address mismatch with known 1st Family Dental, practice closed). Setting undetermined/gate_status=undetermined pending active-status confirmation. This record should NOT be counted in the IL GP corporate denominator until closure and ownership are confirmed.

new_intelligence_summary.mso_platform_pe_evidence: DecisionOne Dental Partners is a self-described DSO (decisiononedental.com: "combining clinical autonomy of private practice with cost efficiencies inherent in a DSO"), 35+ locations IL/WI. The website footer references Smile Brands' Code of Conduct confirming affiliation/operational integration. Smile Brands is PE-backed: Gryphon Investors acquisition documented at https://www.gryphon-inv.com/news/gryphon-investors-acquires-smile-brands/ and https://smilebrands.com/pressrelease/gryphon-investors-acquires-smile-brands/; current backer reported as New Mountain Capital per https://www.drbicuspid.com/dental-business/dso/article/15372465/private-equity-firm-acquires-dso-smile-brands. DecisionOne team page: https://www.decisiononedental.com/support-team
new_intelligence_summary.note: evidence points to DSO/MSO structure but no location currently corporate in DB — candidate hidden consolidator

new_intelligence_summary.mso_platform_pe_evidence: Imagen Dental Partners LLC operates as a Dental Partnership Organization (DPO) providing centralized management services (HR, IT, finance, marketing, compliance, revenue cycle management) to partner practices — confirmed at https://www.imagendentalpartners.com/partner-services/ and https://www.imagendentalpartners.com/about-us/. All three practices in this cluster display 'An Imagen Partner Practice' with '© Imagen® Dental Partners LLC' in footers. No private equity sponsor identified; Imagen explicitly states 'doctor-led, not private equity-owned' at https://www.imagendentalpartners.com/about-us/. Management-company layer is documented and real; pe_backed=false.
new_intelligence_summary.note: evidence points to DSO/MSO structure but no location currently corporate in DB — candidate hidden consolidator

new_intelligence_summary.mso_platform_pe_evidence: Tru Family Dental (the brand now at the same phone/address corridor as North Ave. Dental Partners P.C.) was acquired by Heartland Dental on December 21, 2020. Heartland Dental is majority owned by KKR, a global private equity firm. Sources: https://blog.heartland.com/heartland-dental-grows-national-network-of-supported-offices-with-acquisition-of-tru-family-dental and https://www.groupdentistrynow.com/dso-group-blog/tru-family-dentals-23-offices-join-heartland-dental/
new_intelligence_summary.note: evidence points to DSO/MSO structure but no location currently corporate in DB — candidate hidden consolidator
